summary: Excellent solution. pr-label-assigner.sh: proper error handling, input validation, set -euo pipefail throughout, clear error messages. glob_to_regex function correctly translates ** vs * with POSIX ERE. run-act-tests.sh: well-structured test harness using trap cleanup, proper temp dir isolation, intentional set -uo (not -e) to run all cases then report. Workflow: least-privilege permissions, sensible triggers, validates syntax before tests. No dead code, no repetition. All functions focused and testable. Would ship.
